name: x-keyword-notifier
description: Browser extension that notifies you when a configured keyword is typed into the X post composer.

scripts.prepare-vendor: mkdir -p vendor dict && cp node_modules/kuromoji/build/kuromoji.js vendor/kuromoji.js && cp node_modules/wanakana/wanakana.min.js vendor/wanakana.min.js && cp node_modules/kuromoji/dict/*.dat.gz dict/
scripts.package: npm run prepare-vendor && npm run check && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/x-keyword-notifier.zip manifest.json background.js content.js popup.html popup.css popup.js vendor dict icons README.md LICENSE PRIVACY.md
